productDisplayName: Peter England Men Stripes Navy Blue Polo T-Shirt
description: Composition Red and navy blue striped polo T-shirt with white accents, made of 100% cotton, has a contrast collar, buttoned chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed hems, brand embroidery on the left chest, and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash inside out with like colours, using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry falt in shade Warm iron Chuck boredom out of your life, slip into this striped T-shirt from the Oddies collection of peter england. Crafted from soft cotton fabric, this tee offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Add on denims and suede shoes, and strap on a classy belt. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
